query:
SELECT
    iru.request_url AS url,
    SUM(ir.count) AS "count!"
FROM
    incoming_request ir
JOIN
    incoming_request_url iru ON ir.incoming_request_url_id = iru.incoming_request_url_id
WHERE
    iru.request_url ILIKE '%/callsign/%'
GROUP BY
    iru.incoming_request_url_id, iru.request_url
ORDER BY
    "count!" DESC, url
LIMIT
    10
